docs.text: Soulwright A Minecraft mod where life itself is forged from souls, stars, and fate . In Soulwright, every creature carries a soul shaped by cosmic forces. These souls can be captured, studied, combined, and bound into constructs known as golems . But power always comes with risk—because not all souls want to be controlled. 🌙 The Core Idea Everything in the mod revolves around three forces: Souls – the essence of all living things Attunement – Angelic or Devilish nature Zodiac – celestial identity that shapes behaviour and power From these, you build machines, perform rituals, and create living constructs that evolve with you. ⚖️ Light and Darkness Souls come in two fundamental attunements: ✨ Angel Souls Passive and protective Stabilise rituals Enhance defence and healing Prefer order and balance 🔥 Devil Souls Aggressive and volatile Increase power output Enhance damage and speed Risk instability in complex systems Mixing opposing forces can lead to catastrophic failure—or something far worse. ⭐ The Zodiac System Every soul is aligned to one of 12 Zodiacs , influencing behaviour, abilities, and compatibility. Zodiacs determine: - Golem AI behaviour - Ritual outcomes - Breeding compatibility - Machine efficiency Understanding celestial alignment is key to mastering the mod. 🧪 What You Can Do Soulwright is built around progression through discovery and risk: Capture wandering souls in unstable form Stabilise and store them in Soul Jars Breed new souls using celestial logic Build golems with up to 3 souls Automate soul processing with arcane machines Perform rituals that reshape reality 🏗️ Core Systems Souls The foundation of everything. Souls carry traits, power, and instability. Rituals Magical processes that transform souls and reality itself. Golems Living constructs powered by one or more souls with emergent behaviour. Machines Arcane multiblocks that automate soul processing and resource generation. Starlight Celestial energy harvested from the night sky and converted into Soul Powder. ⚠️ Danger & Instability Power in Soulwright is never safe. Improper soul combinations can create Cursed Spirits Overloaded golems may become unstable Failed rituals can explode or corrupt the surrounding area Angel/Devil imbalance can destabilise entire systems Every powerful decision carries consequences. 🌌 Progression Overview First Night – Encounter Wandering Spirits Capture Souls – Learn to stabilise and store them First Golem – Bind a soul into a construct Rituals & Machines – Expand your workshop Multi-Soul Constructs – Push stability limits Boss Encounters – Claim rare celestial essences Endgame Power – Manipulate fate itself 📖 Documentation Sections Use the sidebar to explore: Items, tools, weapons, and armour Rituals and multiblock structures Machines and automation systems Entities, golems, and spirits Bosses and progression challenges Mechanics and system explanations 🔮 Begin Your Journey The night sky is not empty. It is watching. And every soul remembers where it came from.
